2189000.name: BoomSheets
2189000.description:
BoomSheets™ is a tool designed for indie gamedevs, engine programmers, content creators, and even seasoned game developers looking for a simple tool to create animations. Equipped with a magic wand tool, image atlas compression, and user-defined "attributes" to read as custom code, BoomSheets™ is both easy to learn and easy to master!

The (.ani) exported file is a human-friendly and readable document format for 2D animations referencing a source texture (aka atlas or "spritesheet"). These documents can be edited by hand which is useful for community-driven content and is already used by the Blast Game Engine™. Unlike other animation programs that overwhelm the user with proprietary file formats, too many buttons, and a steep learning curve, BoomSheets™ is the ultimate tool for a free-to-use file format that lets you focus entirely on animating and integrating swiftly into your game!

BoomSheets™ also comes with configurable programmer-friendly options like streaming your animation directly to your game or custom game engine to see instant updates!

What's not to love? Start with BoomSheets™ and start making your animations today!

categories.description: 无需应对快速反应事件
